identity.name: FieldFlow Pro
identity.description: A high-performance, offline-first field service management platform designed for speed, clarity, and reliability in outdoor environments.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-11 px-4 rounded-md font-medium transition-all

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.interactive: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer

inputs.default: flex h-11 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_badges.success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-green-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-green-800 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.warning: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-yellow-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-yellow-800 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.error: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-red-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-red-800 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-gray-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text has at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio against background.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-offset-2).
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all touch targets on mobile.

pwa_specifics.offline_indicator: Must show a clear banner or icon when the user is offline.
pwa_specifics.install_prompt: Custom install prompt design to encourage 'Add to Home Screen'.
pwa_specifics.touch_feedback: Immediate visual feedback on touch (active states).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings (h1-h3) to give a strong, industrial feel.
Use 'Inter' for all body text for maximum legibility.
Implement the 'Performance Pro' color palette: High contrast Black/White with Electric Blue accents.
For the Worker App: Prioritize large touch targets and clear status indicators. Use the 'worker_action' image for the login screen.
For the Admin Dashboard: Use a high-density grid layout. Use 'lucide-react' icons for all navigation items.
Ensure all forms use 'react-hook-form' with 'zod' validation (standard in Shadcn).
Implement a 'NetworkStatus' component that listens to 'navigator.onLine' and shows a warning when offline.
Map integration: Use a placeholder component with a 'Map' icon if actual map integration is complex, but style it as a premium feature.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; stick to solid colors or subtle patterns for a professional look.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`
